text: - H. Performance and payment bond: Subcontractor shall provide performance and payment bonds if required by Contractor, on a form acceptable to Contractor, prescribed by and with a surety acceptable to Contractor in the full amount of this subcontract, for the faithful performance of this subcontract and the payment of all claims for labor, materials and/or equipment furnished under this subcontract. The premium for bonds shall be reimbursed to the Subcontractor by Contractor.
